source_jobs.title: Member of Technical Staff
source_jobs.description:
OpenEvidence is the most widely used medical AI platform in the world.

In just over a year, our usage has grown to >65% of US clinicians via product-led word of mouth adoption. We are a $12B company with a 30 person engineering team from MIT, Harvard, and Stanford. We believe world-changing products come from a small group of exceptional, autonomous builders, organized along focused objectives and empowered to take individual ownership and run fast. We are growing our team to seize a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to define the default platform for medical AI. If you are a world-class engineer or scientist looking to define the bleeding edge and deliver concrete outcomes that impact hundreds of millions of lives, we want to talk.



Culture

We believe work is something that should be engaged with at a world-class level. Building 0->1 and scaling 1->1000 are professional sports, and uncompromising excellence is the bar. We believe building technologies that haven't existed is only possible with end to end ownership. We don't have separate product managers–every engineer and scientist is responsible for landing major improvements to the product. Important things are accomplished when an individual decides to accomplish them.

We believe that work should be hard. We believe good work is precise and intentional. There are no sacred cows. Doing something a certain way just because that's how others are doing it guarantees mediocrity. We believe the quality of the product is paramount and the smallest details matter most. At the same time, developer and product velocity are essential. The best engineers know how to jump right to the hardest part of the problem and take every possible shortcut while keeping the user experience pristine. We believe an engineer's job is to complete and announce important projects and demonstrate their impact, or fail fast and pivot.



Who are you?

If you are looking to complete tickets 9-5 that someone else assigns, this job is not for you. If you are looking to write papers, this job is not for you. If you are looking to lean in and get your hands dirty, bruised, and bloody making something from nothing, personally impact hundreds of millions of lives, and drive ten figures of revenue, this job might be for you.

The ideal candidate is a brilliant builder. They are smart, ambitious, scrappy, autonomous, precise, motivated, hard-working, and low-ego. Does that sound rare? It is rare, we have only found 30 of them, and we would like to find more.




Skillsets

Specific skillsets are secondary, but some important spikes for different facets of our work are:



Machine learning

 - You have experience pushing the boundaries of what modern models are capable of.

 - You have a background in research, but find yourself drawn to actually making things instead of writing papers, and want real ownership and autonomy to build the future.

 - Evaluation and quantitative proof are first-class citizens to you.



Applied AI

 - You excel at building end-to-end systems grounded in a strong intuition about how to leverage modern models as components of extremely thoughtful, intentional systems.



Fullstack

 - You love building end-to-end and seeing ideas through to completion.

 - The concept of creating something with your own two hands and then seeing that used and loved by millions of the most discerning users in the world is highly motivating.



Frontend and/or mobile

 - You are personally in control of the direct user experience. You have extreme attention to detail, and strive to make beautiful, modern, intentional interfaces.

 - You might have experience building beautiful mobile apps that users find to be a joy to use.



Infrastructure / site reliability

 - Every single moment of downtime for a service used in literally life or death moments is something you want to personally eliminate.

 - You thrive building robust, optimized backends for mission-critical domains.



Speed

 - You know that im

source_jobs.title: Software Engineer, Data Platform
source_jobs.description:
Role



As a Data Platform Software Engineer working at OpenEvidence, you will build end-to-end systems powering critical product and research workflows. Your work will focus on performance, scalability, and accuracy, granting you full autonomy over the infrastructure that helps doctors navigate complex clinical decisions in real-time.



We hire exceptional builders, not in narrow lanes. Engineers work across products and projects, owning work wherever they can create the most impact.

OpenEvidence is the most widely used medical AI platform in the world.

All full-time roles on our engineering team are in-person 5 days a week in SF or Miami.

source_jobs.title: Security Engineer, Platform Security
source_jobs.description:
ROLE

As a Security Engineer working at OpenEvidence, you will be a key architect and driver in securing the mission-critical infrastructure powering our medical AI platform used by healthcare providers worldwide, with ownership over the security posture, compliance integrity, and resilience of our production ecosystem. You will design and harden cloud infrastructure using defense-in-depth principles, improving security observability and establishing robust controls across services and data platforms that handle sensitive medical information.

We hire exceptional builders, not in narrow lanes. Engineers work across products and projects, owning work wherever they can create the most impact.

source_jobs.title: Software Engineer, Site Reliability

You will apply an SRE mindset to improve systemic health, performance, and efficiency, reducing toil, strengthening observability, and defining robust service objectives across services and data platforms. source_jobs.title: Make Your Own Role
source_jobs.description:
If you believe you can materially move OpenEvidence forward, we want to hear from you. We build with a small group of exceptional, autonomous builders, and the best people do not always fit inside a job description.




ABOUT US

OpenEvidence is the most widely used medical AI platform in the world.

source_jobs.title: Founding Recruiter
source_jobs.description:
OpenEvidence is the most widely used medical AI platform in the world. In just over a year, we've grown to >65% of US clinicians via product-led word of mouth. We are a $12B company with a 30-person engineering team from MIT, Harvard, and Stanford. We believe world-changing products come from a small group of exceptional, autonomous builders, organized along focused objectives and empowered to take individual ownership and run fast.

The role

We are looking for our first recruiter. It is not a volume role. It is a talent strategy role for someone who believes, as we do, that a single extraordinary hire can change the trajectory of a company, and who wants to personally find and close that hire.

You will own the full recruiting lifecycle: sourcing, coordination, and closing. You will build the systems and processes that define how OpenEvidence attracts world-class engineers and scientists. No playbook exists yet. You will write it.

Who are you?

You are not a recruiter who measures success in req count or time-to-fill. You are someone who thinks deeply about what excellence looks like for a given role, goes to unreasonable lengths to find it, and knows how to convince a top candidate that this is the most important work they could be doing.

You are autonomous. You are precise. You are a builder. You have strong opinions about what a great hiring process looks like and the conviction to implement them. You thrive without structure because you create it.

If you want to post jobs and work your ATS queue, this is not the role for you. If you measure yourself by volume, this is not the role for you. If you're looking for a process to execute rather than a practice to build, this is not the role for you.

What you'll do

 - Own sourcing, coordination, and closing across engineering, science, and key functions

 - Build systems and pipelines to identify and attract the best talent in the world

 - Partner directly with founders to define what exceptional looks like for each hire

 - Move fast without sacrificing bar, because you know that hiring the wrong person is more costly than hiring slowly


CULTURE

We believe work should be engaged with at a world-class level. Building 0->1 and scaling 1->1000 are professional sports, and uncompromising excellence is the bar. We believe building technologies that haven't existed is only possible with end-to-end ownership. Important things are accomplished when an individual decides to accomplish them.



This role is in person in SF. We believe in creating an environment that optimizes for focus and productivity, including providing meals, transport and anything else you need to move quickly.

notes: Highly technical roles, strong engineering focus, and rapid growth suggest a strong engineering culture.
